subject.title: Mathematics Analysis and Approaches (AA)
subject.description:
**IB Mathematics Analysis and Approaches** is a **Group 5** subject in the **International Baccalaureate Diploma Programme (IBDP)**. It explores **number and algebra, functions, geometry and trigonometry, statistics and probability, and calculus**, with a strong focus on **theoretical understanding, formal mathematical reasoning, and analytical problem-solving**.

The course is available at **Standard Level (SL, 150 teaching hours)** and **Higher Level (HL, 240 teaching hours)**, with **first assessment in 2021**.

### Assessment at a Glance

| Assessment | Format | SL | HL | Weighting |
|------------|--------|----|----|-----------|
| **Paper 1** | Non-calculator written exam | 90 minutes | 120 minutes | 40% |
| **Paper 2** | Calculator allowed written exam | 90 minutes | 120 minutes | 40% |
| **Paper 3** | Calculator allowed problem-solving | N/A | 60 minutes | 20% (HL only) |
| **Mathematical Exploration** | Internal Assessment | 20 hours | 20 hours | 20% |

strengths: Clear and logical organization with consistent use of headings, tables, and figures
Arguments build logically through introduction, data collection, analysis, and conclusion
Research question is focused and drives the narrative effectively
weaknesses: Lengthy textbook quotations interrupt the narrative flow
Large rawâdata tables included in the body reduce conciseness
Occasional missing page references to figures and duplicated appendix material
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The exploration is coherent and generally well organized (Strand scores 3,3), but conciseness is weakened by lengthy digressions and repeated definitions (Strand score 2). Overall, this aligns with a band-3 performance for Presentation.

strengths: Logical progression of mathematical explanations from raw data to summary statistics and interpretation
Mostly consistent use of standard statistical notation (Î£x, xÌ, r, S_x)
Effective use of tables, scatter-plots, regression diagrams, and equations to support the text
weaknesses: Minor notation and formatting inconsistencies (italic vs. roman, incorrect subscript)
Occasional misinterpretations (e.g. regression line through the origin) causing brief confusion
Some axes unlabeled and low-resolution images reduce clarity
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Communication is clear and logical with appropriate representations (Strand scores 3 across all), but minor inconsistencies and occasional misconceptions prevent an exceptional band-4 rating. A band-3 score accurately reflects this level.

strengths: Demonstrates initiative by compiling a 119-item dataset and manual calculations
Clear personal approach in choosing themes and justifying stratified sampling
Self-reflection on manual computation shows genuine engagement
weaknesses: Mathematical techniques remain standard with limited creative extension
No exploration of alternative models or deeper statistical innovations
Approach is personal but not particularly innovative
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Personal engagement is evident through dataset choice and sampling justification (Strand scores 2), but lacks the creativity and innovation required for a top band. A band-2 score is appropriate.

strengths: Meaningful reflection on sampling challenges and limitations of the r-value
Thoughtful analysis of slope interpretation and residuals
Clear evaluation comparing predicted price to the Taj Mahal set
weaknesses: Reflection lacks depth in critiquing model reliability and confidence intervals
Superficial treatment of regression-line misconceptions and outlier influence
No comprehensive discussion of future improvements or rigorous outcome evaluation
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The student provides meaningful reflection and thoughtful analysis (Strand scores 2), but falls short of the deep, critical, and comprehensive reflection required for the top band. A band-2 score is justified.

strengths: Effective and correct application of Pearson correlation and linear regression to a substantial dataset
Manual computation of statistics demonstrates thorough engagement with SL mathematics
Integration of RÂ² from spreadsheet adds robustness to the analysis
Step-by-step presentation of formulas for S_x and S_y shows logical mathematical structure
weaknesses: Conceptual misunderstanding about regression line passing through the origin
Confusion between r and rÂ² in interpreting variance explained
Lack of advanced techniques (residual analysis, confidence intervals) limits full expert application
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The mathematics is relevant, fully at course level, and applied comprehensively with substantial manual work and data volume (justifying a band-5 score). Although expertise is not at the innovative frontier (no advanced diagnostics), the depth and correctness of application exceed a simple âeffectiveâ band-4, warranting a band-5 rating.

strandSelections.reasoning: Explanations usually proceed logically (data â summary statistics â r â interpretation).  Occasional misconceptionsâe.g. asserting the regression line can be drawn through (0,0) and (\bar{x},\bar{y})âcreate moments of confusion, so communication is clear but not exemplary.

Most numerical results (means, râ0.93, regression equation from spreadsheet) are correct.  The conceptual error about drawing the regression line through (0,0) indicates partial misunderstanding, and rounding practices are inconsistent; nevertheless overall understanding is good and inaccuracies are limited.

Tables, scatter-plots, regression-line diagrams and equations offer varied representations and are referred to in the text.  They assist understanding, though axes are sometimes unlabeled and images are low-resolution; this is âeffectiveâ but not âhighly effectiveâ use.

The report follows a recognizable progression: introduction, aim, data collection, analysis, estimation and conclusion.  Arguments generally build on prior sections, and the reader can follow the line of thought without major jumps.  Nevertheless, portions describing basic definitions (e.g. long quotations of âcorrelationâ or repeated explanations of stratified sampling) interrupt the main narrative and weaken the seamless flow expected for the top band.

Some initiative is visible in compiling a 119-item dataset and attempting manual calculations, but the mathematical techniques remain standard and there is limited creative extension (no alternative models, residual analysis, or non-linear fits).

There is thoughtful analysis of results (e.g. interpreting slope as cost per piece, explaining residual 7 %), yet the critique of mistaken regression-line construction or outlier influence is superficial, so analysis is âthoughtfulâ but not âdeep and insightfulâ.

The student evaluates the Taj Mahal set against the model and comments on future purchasing decisions; however, there is no rigorous discussion of model reliability, confidence intervals, or how improvements could be implemented, keeping the evaluation clear but not comprehensive.

The student reflects on sampling challenges, acknowledges potential non-linear trends and discusses limitations of the r-value.  Reflection is meaningful and present throughout, but lacks the depth and critical questioning characteristic of the top band.

The student employs standard statistical notation (Î£x, \bar{x}, r, S_x, etc.) correctly in the majority of cases and uses mathematical symbols within explanations.  Minor formatting issues (mixed italic/roman, incorrect subscript in âS_vâ) occur, preventing consistent excellence.

The exploration is clearly linked to the studentâs personal interest in Lego value, and decisions (e.g. focusing on â18+â themes, excluding exclusives) show a personal route through the problem.  The approach is evident yet not particularly innovative.

Most content is relevant to answering the research question, but lengthy digressions (e.g. detailed price-setting commentary, textbook definitions, very large rawâdata tables in the middle of the text) add bulk without advancing the mathematics.  Hence the exploration is âmostlyâ rather than âfullyâ concise.

Correlation, regression and PMCC are entirely relevant to the question and are applied to a substantial data set.  The mathematics is executed effectively, yet remains within a single topic areaâno residual diagnostics or advanced modellingâso comprehensiveness (5) or expertise (6) is not reached.

Choosing a self-compiled data set, justifying stratified sampling and manually computing statistics demonstrate noticeable independent thought, but reliance on textbook methods and spreadsheet output means the independence is significant rather than outstanding.

Headings, sub-headings, tables and figures are used consistently and the sequence (Introduction â Exploration â Analysis â Conclusion) is clear.  Page references to figures are occasionally missing and there is some duplication of appendix material inside the body, so the structure, while solid, is not exceptional.

Pearson correlation, linear regression and stratified sampling are all firmly within AA-SL syllabus and used accurately; the quantity of data and manual computation show solid application at course level, but not beyond.

annotations.comment: Consider defining key variables operationally (e.g. exactly how price and piece count are measured) to improve precision and reproducibility.
The introduction links to personal interest well, demonstrating engagement, but tone is informal in places.
Quotation of the textbook definition of correlation is lengthy and interrupts flow; summarise or move it to an appendix.
The aim section includes a misconception that the regression line passes through (0,0); clarify that it only guarantees passing through the means.
State more explicitly how stratified random sampling reduces bias and any trade-offs from excluding exclusives.
Large raw-data tables in the body hinder conciseness; move full tables to the appendix and refer to summaries.
Axes of the scatter-plot (Figure 2) should be labelled with units and variable names to improve clarity.
Insightful reflection on cluster influence shows thoughtful consideration of outliers and non-linear trends.
The statement that the regression line goes through the origin reflects a misunderstanding; it only passes through (xÌ,yÌ).
The research question is clearly stated and focused, providing a specific investigation of the relationship between set price and piece count.
Calculation of r=0.930 is correct and demonstrates strong SL-level competence in applying PMCC formula.
Formulas for S_x and S_y are correctly applied; the step-by-step presentation is logical and accurate.
Consider summarizing spreadsheet routines with a brief worked example to demonstrate understanding rather than deferring entirely to the appendix.
The interpretation that ââ93% of the data fitâ confuses r with rÂ²; clarify that RÂ²â0.863 represents variance explained.
Including RÂ² from the spreadsheet is a strong check of consistency and reinforces the robustness of the analysis.
The pre-model comparison of sets with similar piece counts shows initiative but lacks rigorous justification.
Stratified sampling justification demonstrates independent thinking and clear personal approach to data collection.
The regression equation y=0.0904x+19.7 is correctly obtained and well integrated into the analysis.
Extend discussion of the y-intercept by relating it quantitatively to non-piece cost factors using external sources or estimates.
The estimation of a 6000-piece set (yâ562.1â¬) is calculated accurately but would benefit from confidence interval analysis.
Comparing predicted and official price for the Taj Mahal set demonstrates clear evaluation of outcomes and personal interest.
The conclusion effectively synthesizes findings, but avoid repeating full introductory details; focus on implications and next steps.
The self-reflection on manual r calculation shows genuine personal engagement but could critically address rounding impact.
Bibliographic entries lack consistent formatting (e.g. indentation, italics); apply a single citation style throughout.
